records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion

Sau nhi87
9u cu87kc tranh lu86{n, ng95pi 96e95s 96ei 96e8691n k8691t lu86{n,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_VTN: r86ng ng95pi s8689 ch87an c9580 86uy, b86ut ch86up h86{u qu86s ra sao.
records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I still don't get it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I still don't get it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I still don't get it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That I had to wait twenty years just to see that smug face of yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That I had to wait twenty years just to see that smug face of yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That I had to wait twenty years just to see that smug face of yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you had to come looking for me while I was keeping myself hidden, then things must be pretty serious right now, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you had to come looking for me while I was keeping myself hidden, then things must be pretty serious right now, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you had to come looking for me while I was keeping myself hidden, then things must be pretty serious right now, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I took a quick look around your company earlier... and I spotted a few familiar faces.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I took a quick look around your company earlier... and I spotted a few familiar faces.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I took a quick look around your company earlier... and I spotted a few familiar faces.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fact that people who know your way of doing things so well have gathered around you again...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fact that people who know your way of doing things so well have gathered around you again...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fact that people who know your way of doing things so well have gathered around you again...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Must mean that you're still moving to save the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Must mean that you're still moving to save the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Must mean that you're still moving to save the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After Commander ended up that way... I shut myself away in Future-at-War and focused on my research for twenty years.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After Commander ended up that way... I shut myself away in Future-at-War and focused on my research for twenty years.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After Commander ended up that way... I shut myself away in Future-at-War and focused on my research for twenty years.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To wake the frozen Deputy Commander, specialized facilities were necessary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To wake the frozen Deputy Commander, specialized facilities were necessary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To wake the frozen Deputy Commander, specialized facilities were necessary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... At first, I only planned to make use of their infrastructure...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... At first, I only planned to make use of their infrastructure...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... At first, I only planned to make use of their infrastructure...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the people involved in the Future-at-War project felt just like looking at who we used to be.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the people involved in the Future-at-War project felt just like looking at who we used to be.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the people involved in the Future-at-War project felt just like looking at who we used to be.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That desire to save others. It was just like seeing our Commander again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That desire to save others. It was just like seeing our Commander again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That desire to save others. It was just like seeing our Commander again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They lit a fire again in my heart... that had nearly burned out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They lit a fire again in my heart... that had nearly burned out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They lit a fire again in my heart... that had nearly burned out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Time... Money... Technology... I prepared everything I thought I was lacking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Time... Money... Technology... I prepared everything I thought I was lacking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Time... Money... Technology... I prepared everything I thought I was lacking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So that I would never repeat the same regrets as back then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So that I would never repeat the same regrets as back then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So that I would never repeat the same regrets as back then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I still don't like you or the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I still don't like you or the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I still don't like you or the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But there's only one reason I'm working with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But there's only one reason I'm working with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But there's only one reason I'm working with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because if Commander were still here... she'd make the same choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because if Commander were still here... she'd make the same choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because if Commander were still here... she'd make the same choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her will... dreams, and faith... There's no way any of that was wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her will... dreams, and faith... There's no way any of that was wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her will... dreams, and faith... There's no way any of that was wrong.
